opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This dark, ugly mole on my back got caught on my shirt and partially ripped off. It's bleeding everywhere and I'm terrified it's a melanoma that's just burst. Please can someone tell me what to do?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I caught it with the towel a couple of hours ago and it tore and started bleeding, and it won't seem to stop — I'm scared it's skin cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, when I was drying my back with a towel and caught the spot
symptom_narrative.duration: the bleeding has been going a couple of hours; the spot itself has been there for years
symptom_narrative.character: a dark, raised, warty-looking spot that's now torn across the top and sore, oozing a bit of blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bleeding is only mild but it keeps oozing, and the torn area stings
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on my back, the right side, about the middle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the spot's been there for years and normally doesn't bother me, but lately it's been catching on my clothes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pressing on it with a tissue seems to slow the bleeding
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it started when I accidentally caught it with the towel
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, I feel well in myself otherwise — I'm just really anxious about it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: it's caught on my clothes before and got a bit irritated, but it's never torn and bled like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mostly it's the worry — I'm independent and otherwise fine

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently and manages on his own; very worried about skin cancer and has been panicking since the spot tore

objective_data_offered.value: a raised dark brown-to-black warty spot on the right mid-back, roughly the size of a fingertip; the top half has torn off leaving a raw pink oozing area
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen only over a phone camera; the patient cannot show a close-up magnified view

objective_data_offered.value: a small amount of blood on a tissue held against the spot; it is oozing slowly, not spurting or dripping fast
